share_header.description: Header title for the share item view

share_settings_title.description: Section title for share configuration options

share_expiration_title.description: Label for the link expiration time setting

share_expiration_desc.message: If the link expires before it's used, you'll need to generate a new one.
share_expiration_desc.description: Description for the link expiration time setting

share_one_time_access_title.description: Label for the one-time access toggle

share_one_time_access_desc.message: When enabled, the link will expire after the data is accessed for the first time.
share_one_time_access_desc.description: Description for the one-time access toggle

share_password_title.description: Label for the password protection setting

share_password_desc.message: The recipient will need this password to open the link.
share_password_desc.description: Description for the password protection setting

share_password_placeholder.description: Placeholder text for the share password input

share_password_error_min_length.message: Password must be at least 8 characters.
share_password_error_min_length.description: Error message when share password is too short

share_button.description: Label for the share submit button

share_submitting.description: Label for the share button while submitting

share_error_encrypt.message: Failed to encrypt Item data. Please try again.
share_error_encrypt.description: Error message when encryption fails during sharing

share_error_api.message: Failed to generate share link. Please try again.
share_error_api.description: Error message when API call fails during sharing

share_error_no_sif.message: Sensitive data is not available. Fetch it from your device first.
share_error_no_sif.description: Error message when trying to share an item without decrypted sensitive data

share_error_size_exceeded.message: This Item is too large to share via link. Please reduce the content and try again.
share_error_size_exceeded.description: Error message when encrypted share data exceeds the maximum allowed size of 16384 bytes

share_error_nothing_to_share.message: This item has no data to share. Add some content first.
share_error_nothing_to_share.description: Error message when trying to share a Secret item that has no shareable content beyond the name

share_feature_not_available.message: Share feature is not available for this Item.
share_feature_not_available.description: Message when share feature cannot be used for the current item
